location: [Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — this weapon does not appear in the base game] Scadu Altus — on a corpse in tall grass beside a burnt-out military camp on the southern stretch of Moorth Highway, directly beneath a roaming Ghostflame Dragon, north of the Moorth Highway, South Site of Grace

source.name: Corpse in burnt camp, Moorth Highway

tactics: From Moorth Highway, South grace, head north along the road; the corpse is in tall grass on the west side and easy to walk past
A Ghostflame Dragon patrols directly overhead — its breath and stomp attacks can one-shot a low-level character, so grab the item and retreat rather than engage it
Use the scorched tents and dead soldiers of the ruined camp as a landmark since the corpse itself is hard to spot in the grass
lore: A mechanized crossbow fitted with a fan-shaped reloading contraption that powers its unique rapid-fire battle art.

builds.name: Rapid-fire status/DPS build
builds.why: Its Repeating Fire skill unloads a fast burst of bolts, good for quick status buildup or burst ranged damage in one sequence
